Banana Protein Milkshake

A five-minute blender shake for using up ripe bananas and hitting a protein number without tasting like a supplement. Frozen fruit keeps it thick without watering it down the way ice does.

Serves 1-2
Active Time ~5 minutes
Total Time ~5 minutes
Photo coming soon

Ingredients

For the shake

Method

1. Blend

Combine the ice cream, frozen fruit, banana, protein powder, and milk in a blender. Blend on high until smooth.

2. Adjust and Serve

Add water a splash at a time until the shake reaches your preferred consistency, blending briefly between additions. Pour and serve immediately.

Cook's Notes

Riper is better The riper (more speckled) the banana, the sweeter the shake—freeze overripe bananas in chunks ahead of time so you always have one on hand.
Quick & EasyHealthy
